cases.name: OCR broken line wraps stay with their own facts
sourceLines: • Buffer memory stores data that is being
• Cache memory keeps frequently used data
expectedKeyPoints: Buffer memory stores data that is being processed temporarily during a task.
Cache memory keeps frequently used data close to the processor.
Virtual memory uses storage as additional working memory.

cases.name: OCR table rows with spacing loss preserve term meanings
sourceLines: Confidentiality  Only authorized users can access information
Integrity        Information stays accurate and unchanged
Availability     Systems and data are accessible when needed
expectedKeyPoints: Confidentiality | Only authorized users can access information
Integrity | Information stays accurate and unchanged
Availability | Systems and data are accessible when needed
